goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should 'arrive by 10:30' and should go to 'stevenage'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
The hotel should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on thursday
The train should arrive by 10:30 and should go to stevenage
Make sure you get price, travel time, and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of hotel
The hotel should be in the north
Make sure you get star of the hotel and whether they have internet
